result.stdout:
Usage: dotnet run --project tools/testdocs/src/TestDocs.Cli -- generate [options]
Options:
  --repoRoot <path>       Repository root (default: current directory)
  --outDir <path>         Output directory (default: docs/testing/generated)
  --strict                Fail when missing/invalid metadata or compliance below threshold
  --minCompliance <0-1>   Compliance threshold (default: 0.95)
  --format <markdown|json|both> (default: both)
